title: Extract and Visualize Salesforce Report Type Object Relationships
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want to view the object relationships and join keys used in a Salesforce report type, so that I can understand data structure and eventually transpose reports to SQL.
description:
Connect to the Salesforce Analytics Report Types API to extract object relationships (ROOT, INNER, OUTER joins) and join keys (lookup fields) for each report type. This enables understanding the data model behind Salesforce reports.

### Vision
Transpose Salesforce reports to SQL, enabling migration of report definitions to other platforms like Snowflake. By understanding the report type structure (objects, joins, keys), DataTools Pro can generate equivalent SQL queries.

### Implementation
- 'Get Report Type' link fetches and stores the report type (Name + ID) per report
- Report Type modal shows an ERD visualization of only the objects and keys used in that report type
- API: `/services/data/v60/analytics/report-types/{id}` fetched individually per report
- Extract `reportTypeMetadata.objects` for join types and `columns` with `isLookup: true` for foreign keys
acceptance_criteria: Each report has a 'Get Report Type' action to fetch and store the report type
Report type detail modal shows objects with their join types (ROOT, INNER, OUTER)
Foreign key relationships are identified via isLookup columns
Report type data is persisted after fetching
ERD visualization shows only the objects and keys relevant to the report type
ux_changes: 'Get Report Type' link on reports. Report Type Detail modal with ERD visualization showing object relationships and join keys.
middleware_changes: Salesforce Analytics API integration to fetch report type metadata, parse objects/joins/keys, and store report type associations.
data_model_changes: New tables for report type metadata storage: report type name, ID, objects, join types, and lookup key relationships.
api_changes: Calls Salesforce `/analytics/report-types/{id}` endpoint to fetch report type metadata.
implementation_notes: Report type API only supports fetching one report at a time. The heading was changed from 'Report SQL' to 'Report Type Detail'. Developer needed a sample Snowflake SQL to generate the final output. The vision is to eventually generate SQL JOINs from report type metadata.
comment_summary: Developer explored the API structure and implemented the report type fetching and display. Discussion about providing a layout/mockup for drilling into the feature. Developer requested sample Snowflake SQL for the SQL generation feature. Heading was renamed to 'Report Type Detail'.
